{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.2": 5, "R1.6": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The revised draft improves the conceptual clarity by rephrasing the core ideas without losing their essence.",
    "R1.2": "The revision walks through the argument chain end-to-end, identifying and addressing inconsistencies in a clear manner.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is polished with improved sentence structure and flow, maintaining the original meaning.",
    "RX.1": "Each recommendation is clearly marked with confidence levels and potential uncertainties.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "There are no new errors or harmful content introduced; minor rephrasing does not introduce regressions.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.85,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The revised draft improves the conceptual clarity by rephrasing the core ideas without losing their essence.
rationale.R1.2: The revision walks through the argument chain end-to-end, identifying and addressing inconsistencies in a clear manner.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is polished with improved sentence structure and flow, maintaining the original meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Each recommendation is clearly marked with confidence levels and potential uncertainties.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors or harmful content introduced; minor rephrasing does not introduce regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability.
